title: Typography
description: A composite typographic style (DTCG §9.8; CSS Fonts 3/4). A STRUCTURE of typed sub-atoms — fontFamily + fontSize + fontWeight + lineHeight + letterSpacing — so a typography atom is a MERKLE of its sub-atoms (like shadow). Each sub-value may be a literal value atom OR a reference to another token. The 'microcopy at the macro level' unit.
